name: Sour Cream Apple Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the dry ingredients: amaranth whole wheat flour, baking powder, sea salt (if using), and cinnamon.
2. In another bowl, whisk together the honey, grated apple, beaten egg or egg replacer, vanilla extract, sour cream, and water or buttermilk until well combined.
3. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just blended, being careful not to overmix.
4. Heat a preheated griddle or large skillet to 350°F (175°C).
5. Using a ladle or ice cream scoop, pour about 1/4 cup of batter onto the hot griddle for each pancake.
6. Cook the pancakes on the griddle for 3-5 minutes, turning once, until they are golden brown and cooked through.
7. Serve the pancakes hot as breakfast, brunch, or alongside dinner dishes.
